category_sources: source_facts.description says Sound eXchange NG; source_facts.homepage points to the official Codeberg project for sox_ng.
display_name_sources: Official project URL and source_facts.name identify the project as sox_ng; official README terminology uses SoX_ng for the project.

repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official Codeberg source-control project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Sound eXchange NG; source_facts.executables lists sox_ng, play_ng, rec_ng, and soxi_ng command-line tools.
